message:
feat(mermaid): add requirementDiagram layout + entity renderer (bd-hudcn.1.9.3)

Add specialized requirementDiagram layout engine with wider entity boxes
(16x4 minimum) for multi-line labels (<<kind>>\nname pattern). Uses
standard Sugiyama rank assignment with constraint support for entity
placement, and orthogonal edge routing for relations.

Add render_requirement_entities() with bordered entity boxes using
GlyphPalette border characters, multi-line label rendering, and
relation edge drawing. Includes 4 layout tests (empty, single entity,
relations, deterministic).

Also fixes unused `ir` parameter warning in render_gitgraph_lanes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
